summary: Markets show mixed sentiment today with bullish momentum in US stocks and crude oil amid Iran deal optimism, while Bitcoin faces bearish rejection near highs and gold/silver trends weaken. Forex pairs like USD/JPY and AUD/USD exhibit sideways to bullish trends ahead of key data. Overall cautious optimism prevails in equities and select commodities, contrasted by crypto volatility.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: DegenDave identifies a critical level with potential for either a trap move or bull run continuation, suggesting uncertainty at a key inflection point

signals.name: Altcoins (General)
signals.reason: DegenDave recommends longing altcoins before Bitcoin reaches $82K, suggesting he expects altcoin outperformance during this price phase

signals.name: Gold
signals.reason: Gold and silver have quietly lost their trends, with advice to avoid them amid bullish broader markets.

signals.name: Brent Crude Oil
signals.reason: Emerging bullish case targeting 102 level with persistent supply issues, despite weak bid.

signals.name: USD/JPY
signals.reason: Trading sideways above ¥159 with trend traders remaining long.

signals.name: AUD/USD
signals.reason: Bullish view to buy with take-profit at 0.7050 ahead of expected higher Australian inflation data.

signals.name: EUR/USD
signals.reason: Euro strengthening against Dollar due to hawkish ECB comments amid cautious forex optimism.

signals.name: Apple
signals.reason: US stocks including major indices hit record highs on Iran deal optimism, signaling long trades.

signals.name: Nvidia
signals.reason: NASDAQ 100 at new all-time highs in off-hours trading, with excellent long signal on close.

signals.name: Alphabet/Google
signals.reason: S&P 500 and major US equity indices at record highs, bullish for trend traders.

signals.name: Solana
signals.reason: No specific mentions today amid broader Bitcoin-focused crypto commentary.

signals.name: Ethereum
signals.reason: No direct sentiment found today, with focus on Bitcoin volatility.
